languages.text: {n}Вы и ваша свита, по-видимому, единственные, кто сохранил здесь свободу воли. Прочие узники этой загадочной ловушки обречены вновь и вновь повторять одни и те же действия, запертые в дне, когда Даргонус осадили войска {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы и ваша свита, по-видимому, единственные, кто сохранил здесь свободу воли. Прочие узники этой загадочной ловушки обречены вновь и вновь повторять одни и те же действия, запертые в дне, когда Даргонус осадили войска {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы и ваша свита, по-видимому, единственные, кто сохранил здесь свободу воли. Прочие узники этой загадочной ловушки обречены вновь и вновь повторять одни и те же действия, запертые в дне, когда Даргонус осадили войска {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}.{/n}

{n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

{n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你与你的随从似乎是这里唯一一群还保有自由意志的人。而这神秘陷阱中的其他囚徒，则注定要一遍又一遍地重复同样的行为，永远被困在达戈努斯遭{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}大军围攻的那一天。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你与你的随从似乎是这里唯一一群还保有自由意志的人。而这神秘陷阱中的其他囚徒，则注定要一遍又一遍地重复同样的行为，永远被困在达戈努斯遭{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}大军围攻的那一天。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre entourage et vous-même semblez être les seuls ici à rester en possession de votre libre arbitre. Les autres prisonniers de ce piège mystérieux sont condamnés à répéter encore et encore les mêmes gestes, à jamais coincés en ce jour fatidique où les forces de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} ont assiégé Dargonus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre entourage et vous-même semblez être les seuls ici à rester en possession de votre libre arbitre. Les autres prisonniers de ce piège mystérieux sont condamnés à répéter encore et encore les mêmes gestes, à jamais coincés en ce jour fatidique où les forces de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} ont assiégé Dargonus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Görünüşe göre burada hâlâ özgür iradeye sahip olanlar bir tek sen ve maiyetin. Bu gizemli tuzağın diğer tutsakları; sonsuza dek Dargonus'un {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon{/g} kuvvetlerinin kuşattığı güne hapsolmuş hâlde, aynı eylemleri tekrar tekrar yapmaya mahkûmlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Görünüşe göre burada hâlâ özgür iradeye sahip olanlar bir tek sen ve maiyetin. Bu gizemli tuzağın diğer tutsakları; sonsuza dek Dargonus'un {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon{/g} kuvvetlerinin kuşattığı güne hapsolmuş hâlde, aynı eylemleri tekrar tekrar yapmaya mahkûmlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu séquito y tú parecéis ser los únicos dotados de libre albedrío. Los otros prisioneros de esta trampa misteriosa están condenados a repetir las mismas acciones una y otra vez, atrapados en el día en el que Dargonus fue asediado por las fuerzas de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu séquito y tú parecéis ser los únicos dotados de libre albedrío. Los otros prisioneros de esta trampa misteriosa están condenados a repetir las mismas acciones una y otra vez, atrapados en el día en el que Dargonus fue asediado por las fuerzas de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Außer dir und deinem Gefolge scheint niemand mehr über einen freien Willen zu verfügen. Die anderen Gefangenen der mysteriösen Falle sind dazu verdammt, immer und immer wieder dasselbe zu tun, auf ewig in dem Tag gefangen, an dem Dargonus von den Armeen der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} belagert wurde.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Außer dir und deinem Gefolge scheint niemand mehr über einen freien Willen zu verfügen. Die anderen Gefangenen der mysteriösen Falle sind dazu verdammt, immer und immer wieder dasselbe zu tun, auf ewig in dem Tag gefangen, an dem Dargonus von den Armeen der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} belagert wurde.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたとあなたの側近は、この謎の罠に捕らわれた他の囚人とは異なり、まだ自由意志を持っているようです。この謎の罠に捕らわれた他の囚人は、ドラゴナスが{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}宗教裁判{/g}軍に包囲された日と同じ行動を繰り返す運命にあります。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You and your retinue seem to be the only ones here still in possession of free will. The other captives of this mysterious trap are doomed to repeat the same actions over and over again, forever trapped in the day Dargonus was besieged by {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} forces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたとあなたの側近は、この謎の罠に捕らわれた他の囚人とは異なり、まだ自由意志を持っているようです。この謎の罠に捕らわれた他の囚人は、ドラゴナスが{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}宗教裁判{/g}軍に包囲された日と同じ行動を繰り返す運命にあります。{/n}
